arts.ttl: Leeds United v Cardiff City Live: Kick-off time, team news and score updates
arts.sum: The Bluebirds travel to Elland Road unbeaten in nine games in all competitions

arts.ttl: Leeds' final transfer warning with Joel Piroe and Brenden Aaronson in spotlight
arts.sum: Another game without a goal for the strikers would intensify the push from fans for a new face before Monday’s transfer deadline. Leeds United will look to go 13 games unbeaten today when they welcome Cardiff City to Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Leeds United promotion rivals in 'final stages' of stunning transfer
arts.sum: But Scott Parker's team are gearing up for a strong end to the season, with transfer expert Fabrizio Romano reporting that they are in advanced talks with Sporting CP over a deal to sign former Tottenham Hotspur and England youth international Edwards. After several seasons impressing with Guimaraes, former England youth international Edwards joined reigning Primeira Liga champions Sporting CP in January 2022 for roughly £5m.

arts.ttl: All eyes on 1:45pm Southampton announcement as Leeds United hope for transfer movement
arts.sum: Leeds United have already asked the question of Southampton about taking striker Cameron Archer on loan, and his presence or non-presence in their squad might be an indication of their plans for him. Leeds made an opening loan offer to Southampton for their £15million striker Cameron Archer this week, looking at serious firepower to Farke’s front line after the stalemate at Burnley.

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker makes Leeds United admission
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker has defended his team's display in Monday’s goalless draw with Leeds United, stating it was never his intention to play so reserved and that the visitors frustrated his attacking plans. No, our intention was to go into that game to put a marker down for us to replicate what we did against Plymouth.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Cardiff City on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United will hope to extend their lead at the top of the Championship when they face Cardiff City on Saturday afternoon. However, fans outside of the United Kingdom will be able to watch the game live on LUTV and Cardiff City TV.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Pascal Struijk teases injury update pre-Cardiff
arts.sum: In particular, he revealed that Pascal Struijk has returned to team training since Tuesday, putting him in contention to featured after missing the last four league games with injury. Leeds United take on Cardiff City this afternoon with the aim of consolidating their place at the top of the table following Monday’s draw at Burnley.

arts.ttl: If Leeds United require low-cost transfer solution, this week’s opponents may have the man
arts.sum: Leeds United are going to want an attacking midfielder in the closing days of the window, and if they require a lower cost signing, Cardiff City’s Rubin Colwill might be worth considering. Rubin Colwill: Do Leeds need to consider lower-cost, realistic signing?

arts.ttl: Leeds United make first sale of January transfer window as attacker leaves Elland Road
arts.sum: Leeds United have confirmed the permanent exit of Sonny Perkins, who joins loan club Leyton Orient permanently. The 20-year-old made his first team debut in the 2022/23 season and scored his first goal for the club in an Emirates FA Cup clash away at Cardiff City.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke drops Leeds United rotation hint for Cardiff City with Junior Firpo admission
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is delighted with the form of Sam Byram but says he is not “naive” to think the 31-year-old can play every single Leeds United game, admitting he is pleased to have Junior Firpo back for possible selection. Defending Jaidon Anthony [who] was an important player for Burnley, to take him more or less out of the game, I think he was excellent in defending terms.
